programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
36/52. Tha AH-AH farmadach an-diugh oir tha e den bheachd nach eil ùine aig MacÌomhair air a shon. AH-AH is jealous today as he thinks MacÌomhair has no time for him.
4/26. Ernest is grumbling. His bees are producing bitter, inedible honey. However, Célestine is delighted as Mrs Tulip's flowers have never been so lovely!
11/52. Tha dèideagan Pip rin sgioblachadh 's tha Posy 'son taic a thoirt dha. Pip's toys need to be sorted and Posy wants to help out.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 32/52. Abney and Teal construct a dragon. Neep puts on a brave face, but he isn't really sure he wants to share the island with such a scary monster!
12/26. Brush is having her forest house painted in a more fashionable colour, unlike the dull brown of Fox and Hare's den.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 43/52. Tha oidhche spà dol a bhith ann. A spa night is going to take place.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 44/52. Tha Mrs Kaufmann a' buinnig duais ach chan eil fhios cò a thabhainn i. Mrs Kaufmann wins a prize, but no-one knows who donated it!
1/8. Calum visits Polmadie Recycling Centre to find out what happens to the green bin waste in Glasgow City.
5/9. Tha Adrian ag ràdh ri fear na bùtha-spòrs gur e Timo Boll an gaisgeach teanas-bùird aige. Adrian tells the local sports shop owner that Timo Boll is his table-tennis hero.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
4/6. Peter starts planting on the croft and goes to look at some unique sheep. Tha Pàdruig a' cur buntàta agus a' dol a shealltainn air caoraich gu math sònraichte.
8/12. Donald Morrison looks back at some of the stories from the BBC Gaelic current affairs series, including the 51st Highland Division remembered at a special service in Uist.
8/8. Am prògram mu dheireadh tro cuairt-beatha nam ban. Concluding the series exploring themes of Gaelic poetry and songs of women in Scotland.
Anna Macleod chairs a special debate ahead of the Scottish elections in May.

programmes.show_name: Immigration Tracks - Canada, le Anne NicAilpein
programmes.show_description: 1/7. From Canada's eastern province of Cape Breton, Anne MacAlpine journeys to Toronto, Ontario. Finding a home away from home, she visits Baile nan Gàidheal.
4/4. Mary Ann Kennedy presents a music show from Celtic Connections 2026, featuring Mary Frances, Heidi Talbot, Boubacar Samaké, Maggie MacInnes and Michael McGovern.
4/6. Featuring performances from the acclaimed Gary Sutherland Ceilidh Band, recorded at the Trad Awards 2021. With Gary and his first class band performing a lively set of jigs.
1/4. The capercaillie's story begins in the far north as biologists capture wild animals in central Sweden to take to Germany's Niederlausitz Natural Park.
2/2. Tha Catrìona NicNèill aig Farpais Chòmhlan Pìoba na Cruinne 2025. Carrie MacNeil presents Grade One performances from the 2025 World Pipe Band Championships.
27/30. An t-annas RuMac 's a chòmhlan-aon-neach air Àrd-Ùrlar a' Ghàrraidh aig Belladrum 2025. One-man band phenomenon RuMac on the Garden Stage at Belladrum.

...Raith Rovers v Inverness CT. 5/5. Join Micheal Steele for the KDM Evolution Trophy final live from Firhill in Glasgow.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach seachdainn le sgioba-naidheachd BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news from BBC ALBA.
3/9. Prògram spioradail le laoidhean, sailm agus leughaidhean. Amongst the singers performing are Emma MacLeod, Hamish Scott, and Rona MacLeod with Duncan MacLeod.
3/7. Featuring Mànran recorded at the Trad Awards in December 2023 in the Caird Hall, Dundee.
7/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
Revealing the variety and importance of Jurassic dinosaur finds on Skye. Beairteas làraich chudromach dìneasar na linne Jurassic san Eilean Sgitheanaich.

programmes.show_name: Surfing: Marcachd an Tuinn/Riding the Wave
programmes.show_description: 2/2. Eachdraidh Surfadh air feadh an t-saoghail. The history of surfing across the world.
4/4. Mary Ann Kennedy presents a music show from Celtic Connections 2026, featuring Mary Frances, Heidi Talbot, Boubacar Samaké, Maggie MacInnes and Michael McGovern.
